name: Italian Chicken
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces Olives, drained and pitted, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken in a lightly greased 12x8x2-inch baking dish.
2. Arrange tomatoes, mushrooms, olives, and artichokes on top of the chicken.
3. Combine Italian dressing and wine; pour over vegetables and chicken.
4. Sprinkle with onion soup mix.
5. Cover and bake at 350°F for 1 hour, or until the chicken is done.
6. Meanwhile, cook the linguine according to package instructions.
7. When the chicken is done, spoon the juices and vegetables over the pasta and top with the chicken.
Hope you enjoy. Jane (TN)
